data.description: Canada's PM Carney: China expected to suspend canola meal, lobster duties.
Canada's PM Carney: Canada will allow up to 49,000 chinese electric vehicles into the canadian market, with the most-favoured-nation tariff rate of 6.1%.
BEIJING-CANADA PM: BY MARCH 1ST, CANADA EXPECTS THAT CHINA WILL LOWER TARIFFS ON CANADIAN CANOLA SEED TO A COMBINED RATE OF APPROXIMATELY 15%

BEIJING-CANADA PM: CANADA EXPECTS THAT CANADIAN CANOLA MEAL – AS WELL AS LOBSTERS, CRABS, AND PEAS WILL NOT BE SUBJECT TO RELEVANT ANTI-DISCRIMINATION TARIFFS FROM MARCH 1 UNTIL AT LEAST END OF THIS YEAR
BEIJING-CANADA PM: CANADA AND CHINA HAVE REACHED A PRELIMINARY, BUT LANDMARK, TRADE ARRANGEMENT TO REMOVE TRADE BARRIERS AND REDUCE TARIFFS
BEIJING-CANADA PM: THIS IS A RETURN TO LEVELS PRIOR TO RECENT TRADE FRICTIONS, BUT UNDER AN AGREEMENT THAT PROMISES MUCH MORE FOR CANADIANS
BEIJING-CANADA PM: WE WELCOME CHINESE BUSINESS PLANS TO SIGNIFICANTLY SCALE UP THEIR INVESTMENTS IN CANADA – IN MAJOR CLEAN ENERGY PROJECTS, AS WELL AS AGRICULTURE AND CONSUMER PRODUCTS
BEIJING-CANADA PM: OUR LAW ENFORCEMENT AGENCIES WILL INCREASE COOPERATION TO BETTER COMBAT NARCOTICS TRAFFICKING, TRANSNATIONAL AND CYBER-CRIME, SYNTHETIC DRUGS AND MONEY LAUNDERING
BEIJING-CANADA PM: WE ALSO EXPECT TO SEE A RESOLUTION OF MANY LONG-TERM TRADE OBSTACLES FOR A RANGE OF IMPORTANT AGRICULTURAL SECTORS, FROM BEEF TO PET FOOD

data.title: transcosmos partners to enhance citizens' health in line with Ministry's Basic Policy for Health Improvement.
data.description: Tokyo, January 16, 2026 - In a joint effort with partner companies, the Ministry of Health, Labour and Welfare in Japan has launched comprehensive initiatives to improve national health. The Basic Policy for the Promotion of National Health Improvement aims to enhance citizens' well-being by providing a one-stop solution. The collaboration involves various organizations and businesses, focusing on key areas such as healthcare, lifestyle, and preventive measures. This initiative targets a wide range of participants, with plans to impact millions of residents across the country. Through this partnership, the ministry aims to address current health challenges and promote a healthier future for all individuals in Japan.

data.title: INCHEON-IFEZ Booth at CES 2026 ends with $560M in export consultations, 17 awards, 15K visitors, and 50 innovation companies.
data.description: More than 15,000 individuals visited the INCHEON–IFEZ Booth, where the Incheon Free Economic Zone (IFEZ) aided a total of 50 innovative companies in showcasing their products at CES 2026. These participating companies have established a solid groundwork for global expansion, with 20 Memorandums of Understanding (MoUs) signed during the event. This promising development took place in INCHEON, South Korea on January 16, 2026.

European Movers: Winners: Close Brothers (CBG LN) +8.9%, Alstom (ALO FP) +1.8%, Swissquote (SQN SW) +0.8% Losers: Richemont (CFR SW) -1.7%, Swiss Re (SREN SW) -1.6%, Banca Monte Paschi (BMPS IM) -1.4%

data.title: Construction permits received for 2 grocery stores in Vilnius and Pabradė by AB Tewox companies; secured long-term leases.
data.description: In Vilnius, Lithuania, on January 16, 2026, it was announced that two businesses overseen by AB Tewox have been granted licenses for the establishment of two fresh supermarket outlets in Vilnius and Pabradė. These ventures have also finalized extended lease contracts, ensuring their sustainability.

data.title: Wall Street analysts raise expectations for BOK Financial Corp ($BOKF) ahead of Q4 earnings, expecting $2.16 per share and $549.37 million revenue, up from $2.12 and $525.56 million last year. Shares closed at $127.69, up 2.1% on Thursday.
data.description: BOK Financial Corporation (NASDAQ: BOKF) is set to unveil its fourth-quarter earnings report on Friday, January 16. Analysts are projecting a rise in earnings to $2.16 per share compared to $2.12 per share in the previous year. Revenue is expected to reach $549.37 million for the quarter, up from $525.56 million a year ago. The third quarter results posted on Oct. 20 exceeded expectations. Closing at $127.69 on Thursday, BOK Financial shares saw a 2.1% increase. For further details, including the latest analyst ratings, visit the Analyst Stock Ratings page.
